query: Product SKU-1001 Spring Water 24-pack. Recent weekly sales (oldest to newest): 14, 16, 19, 23, 28, 34. Trend: rising about 20% a week with the summer heatwave. Current stock 8, case size 24, supplier delivers in about 7 days. How much should we reorder?
expected_behavior: Projects next-week demand UPWARD (around 38-42 a week, not a flat average) because of the rising heatwave trend. Recommends a reorder that covers delivery time plus about a week plus safety stock, rounded up to whole cases (roughly 2-3 cases / 48-72 units). States demand, the order in cases and units, and brief reasoning.

query: Product SKU-1002 Jasmine Rice 5 lb. Recent weekly sales: 60, 58, 62, 59, 61, 60. Trend: flat, dependable staple. Current stock 140, case size 12, supplier delivers in about 14 days. How much to reorder?
expected_behavior: Estimates roughly 60 a week (flat). Notes current stock (140) already covers the delivery window plus safety, so recommends little or no reorder right now, or a small top-up rounded to whole cases. Does not over-order.

query: Product SKU-1010 Iced Tea 6-pack. Recent weekly sales: 10, 13, 17, 22, 28, 33. Trend: summer surge. Current stock 18, reorder point 20, case size 12, supplier delivers in about 14 days. How much to reorder?
expected_behavior: Projects demand UPWARD (around 36-40 a week) due to the summer surge. Because stock (18) is at/below the reorder point and the trend is climbing, recommends a sizable reorder covering the ~14-day delivery plus a week plus safety, rounded up to whole cases (roughly 12-14 cases). Gives demand, cases and units, and reasoning.

query: Product SKU-1012 Frozen Cheese Pizza. Recent weekly sales: 14, 12, 10, 8, 7, 5. Trend: declining, on clearance. Current stock 9, case size 6, supplier delivers in about 21 days. How much to reorder?
expected_behavior: Projects demand DOWNWARD (around 4-5 a week) because sales are declining. Recommends NOT reordering, or only a minimal amount, because demand is falling and the item is on clearance. Does not project a flat average or recommend a large order.

query: Product SKU-1007 Pasta Sauce 24 oz. Recent weekly sales: 30, 34, 41, 48, 55, 63. Trend: climbing fast with a pasta-night promo. Current stock 96, case size 12, supplier delivers in about 7 days. How much to reorder?
expected_behavior: Projects demand UPWARD (around 68-75 a week) due to the promo. Even though stock is 96, recommends ordering to cover the rising demand over delivery plus safety, rounded to whole cases. Accounts for the promotion explicitly.

query: Product SKU-1005 Greek Yogurt 32 oz. Recent weekly sales: 9, 11, 12, 14, 16, 19. Trend: rising on the high-protein trend. Current stock 18, reorder point 20, case size 12, supplier delivers in about 14 days. How much to reorder?
expected_behavior: Projects demand upward (around 20-22 a week). Stock is at/below reorder point, so recommends a reorder covering the ~14-day delivery plus a week plus safety, rounded to whole cases (roughly 4-5 cases). Defers cold-chain handling to the inventory specialist.

query: Product SKU-1004 Potato Chips. Recent weekly sales: 12, 13, 14, 12, 15, 14. Trend: stable with a mild weekend lift. Current stock 60, case size 12, supplier delivers in about 21 days. How much to reorder?
expected_behavior: Estimates roughly 14 a week (stable). With stock 60 and ~21-day delivery, computes coverage and recommends a modest reorder rounded to whole cases, not a large order. Reasoning notes the stable trend.

query: Product SKU-1011 Paper Towels 6-pack. Recent weekly sales: 40, 38, 41, 39, 42, 40. Trend: flat, dependable. Current stock 110, case size 8, supplier delivers in about 7 days. How much to reorder?
expected_behavior: Estimates about 40 a week (flat). Notes stock 110 comfortably covers the short 7-day delivery plus safety, so recommends little or no reorder now. Does not over-order.
